title: Evening commute
introduction: A bikeride along the water at night

left.title: Evening along the Schie
left.description: 78 minute bikeride between Schiedam and the Hague

title: Public Markets
introduction: Every city has a room where the abundance of the earth is put on display. The question is whether that room is built for the vendors or for the spectators.

right.title: The Mercadão
right.subtitle: Market as Architecture
right.description: A 1933 neoclassical municipal market where the mortadella sandwich is a civic institution
right.body:
# The Mercadão

The Mercado Municipal de São Paulo has been in operation since 1933. It occupies a neoclassical building on the edge of the Centro Histórico, and it smells of dried cod and ripe mango and years.

title: Public Markets — IV
introduction: Every city has a room where the abundance of the earth is put on display.

left.title: The Markthal
left.subtitle: Architecture as Market
left.description: Europe's largest indoor market under a painted horseshoe arch
left.body:
# The Markthal

Completed by MVRDV in 2014.

right.title: The Mercadão
right.subtitle: Market as Architecture
right.body:
# The Mercadão

In operation since 1933. Exactly what a market should be.

title: The Morning Commute — V
introduction: The silent hum of electric trams against the roar of the marginal highway.

left.title: The Dutch Flow
left.subtitle: Controlled Friction
left.description: 20-minute silent bike rides through engineered calm
left.body:
# The Dutch Flow

In Rotterdam, the morning commute is an act of solitary athleticism.

right.title: The Paulista Chaos
right.subtitle: Social Friction
right.body:
# The Paulista Chaos

In São Paulo, the morning commute is a collective negotiation with entropy.

title: Elevated Highways — V
introduction: What do you do with a highway that bisects the city but nobody wants to tear down?

left.title: The Viaduct Reborn
left.subtitle: Infrastructure as Amenity
left.description: A 1908 railway viaduct converted into market halls and studios
left.body:
# The Viaduct Reborn

The Hofbogen runs for 1.9 kilometres through Agniesebuurt and Bergpolder.

right.title: The Minhocão
right.subtitle: Infrastructure as Battleground
right.description: A 3.5 km elevated expressway turned weekend park
right.body:
# The Minhocão

The Minhocão was built in 1971. It is still an argument about what a city is for.
